name: Red Wyvern
effectText:
1 Tuner + 1+ non-Tuner monsters
If a monster with higher ATK than this Synchro Summoned card is on the field (Quick Effect): You can destroy the 1 face-up monster on the field that has the highest ATK (your choice, if tied). This effect can only be used once while this card is face-up on the field.
